```{r Procrustes residuals}
  tm_shape(GA.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 21,
             border.col="white",
             col = "black",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.stack = "horizontal",
            legend.outside.position = "bottom",
            legend.outside.size = 0.1, 
            legend.text.size = 1,
            legend.title.size=1.5,
            main.title = "CR vs. GA", title.size = 0.4, 
            title.position = c("right", "center"), 
            inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05))

tmap_save(CR.GA.rastProc.vif.2, filename = "CR.GA.ProcrustesMap.vif_2.pdf")

#CRvsXA----
CR.XA.diff.procrustes.vif = procrustes(CR.PCA.vif, XA.PCA.vif, scale=TRUE, symmetrical=FALSE)
CR.XA.resids.vif = residuals(CR.XA.diff.procrustes.vif)

summary(CR.XA.resids.vif)
#     Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
#6.095e-05 1.593e-03 2.105e-03 2.329e-03 2.932e-03 8.709e-03  

#Specify raster properties based on an existing one
CR.XA.rastProc.vif <- Env.stack.3$BIO05  

# Make all non-zero values in mask = 0.015
CR.XA.rastProc.vif[CR.XA.rastProc.vif != 0] <- 8.709e-03

#Assign residuals to raster cells
CR.XA.rastProc.vif[Env.stack.3.df$ID] <- CR.XA.resids.vif  

##Map the results----
pdf("CR.XA.ProcrustesMap.vif.pdf")
plot(CR.XA.rastProc.vif, col = sequential_hcl(23, "Lajolla"),
     main="CR vs. XA",
     font.main=4, font.lab=4, font.sub=4)
dev.off()

CR.XA.rastProc.vif.2 <- tm_shape(CR.XA.rastProc.vif)+
  tm_raster(style = 'cont',
            n=6, 
            palette= "-RdGy",
            title="",
            legend.is.portrait = FALSE) +
  tm_shape(gnp) +  
  tm_borders("black", lwd = 1)  +
  tm_shape(CR.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 21,
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_shape(XA.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 24,
             border.col="white",
             col = "black",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.stack = "horizontal",
            legend.outside.position = "bottom",
            legend.outside.size = 0.1, 
            legend.text.size = 1,
            legend.title.size=1.5,
            main.title = "CR vs. XA", title.size = 0.4, 
            title.position = c("right", "center"), 
            inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05))

tmap_save(CR.XA.rastProc.vif.2, filename = "CR.XA.ProcrustesMap.vif_2.pdf")

#EIvsEO----
EI.EO.diff.procrustes.vif = procrustes(EI.PCA.vif, EO.PCA.vif, scale=TRUE, symmetrical=FALSE)
EI.EO.resids.vif = residuals(EI.EO.diff.procrustes.vif)

summary(EI.EO.resids.vif)
#.    Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
#0.0002222 0.0046673 0.0066752 0.0074918 0.0097004 0.0323659 

#Specify raster properties based on an existing one
EI.EO.rastProc.vif <- Env.stack.3$BIO05  

# Make all non-zero values in mask = 0.015
EI.EO.rastProc.vif[EI.EO.rastProc.vif != 0] <- 0.0323659  

#Assign residuals to raster cells
EI.EO.rastProc.vif[Env.stack.3.df$ID] <- EI.EO.resids.vif  

##Map the results----
pdf("EI.EO.ProcrustesMap.vif.pdf")
plot(EI.EO.rastProc.vif, col = sequential_hcl(23, "Lajolla"),
     main="EI vs. EO",
     font.main=4, font.lab=4, font.sub=4)
dev.off()

EI.EO.rastProc.vif.2 <- tm_shape(EI.EO.rastProc.vif)+
  tm_raster(style = 'cont',
            n=6, 
            palette= "-RdGy",
            title="",
            legend.is.portrait = FALSE) +
  tm_shape(gnp) +  
  tm_borders("black", lwd = 1)  +
  tm_shape(EI.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 24,
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_shape(EO.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 23,
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.stack = "horizontal",
            legend.outside.position = "bottom",
            legend.outside.size = 0.1, 
            legend.text.size = 1,
            legend.title.size=1.5,
            main.title = "EI vs. EO", title.size = 0.4, 
            title.position = c("right", "center"), 
            inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05))

tmap_save(EI.EO.rastProc.vif.2, filename = "EI.EO.ProcrustesMap.vif_2.pdf")

#EIvsGA----
EI.GA.diff.procrustes.vif = procrustes(EI.PCA.vif, GA.PCA.vif, scale=TRUE, symmetrical=FALSE)
EI.GA.resids.vif = residuals(EI.GA.diff.procrustes.vif)

summary(EI.GA.resids.vif)
#    Min.  1st Qu.   Median     Mean  3rd Qu.     Max. 
#0.001131 0.005222 0.008178 0.010262 0.014021 0.061290

#Specify raster properties based on an existing one
EI.GA.rastProc.vif <- Env.stack.3$BIO05  

# Make all non-zero values in mask = 0.015
EI.GA.rastProc.vif[EI.GA.rastProc.vif != 0] <- 0.061290 

#Assign residuals to raster cells
EI.GA.rastProc.vif[Env.stack.3.df$ID] <- EI.GA.resids.vif  

##Map the results----
pdf("EI.GA.ProcrustesMap.vif.pdf")
plot(EI.GA.rastProc.vif, col = sequential_hcl(23, "Lajolla"),
     main="EI vs. GA",
     font.main=4, font.lab=4, font.sub=4)
dev.off()

EI.GA.rastProc.vif.2 <- tm_shape(EI.GA.rastProc.vif)+
  tm_raster(style = 'cont',
            n=6, 
            palette= "-RdGy",
            title="",
            legend.is.portrait = FALSE) +
  tm_shape(gnp) +  
  tm_borders("black", lwd = 1)  +
  tm_shape(EI.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 24,
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_shape(GA.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 21,
             border.col="white",
             col = "black",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.stack = "horizontal",
            legend.outside.position = "bottom",
            legend.outside.size = 0.1, 
            legend.text.size = 1,
            legend.title.size=1.5,
            main.title = "EI vs. GA", title.size = 0.4, 
            title.position = c("right", "center"), 
            inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05))

tmap_save(EI.GA.rastProc.vif.2, filename = "EI.GA.ProcrustesMap.vif_2.pdf")

#EIvsXA----
EI.XA.diff.procrustes.vif = procrustes(EI.PCA.vif, XA.PCA.vif, scale=TRUE, symmetrical=FALSE)
EI.XA.resids.vif = residuals(EI.XA.diff.procrustes.vif)

summary(EI.XA.resids.vif)
#     Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
#0.0001716 0.0061360 0.0082718 0.0091430 0.0114723 0.0315131 

#Specify raster properties based on an existing one
EI.XA.rastProc.vif <- Env.stack.3$BIO05  

# Make all non-zero values in mask = 0.015
EI.XA.rastProc.vif[EI.XA.rastProc.vif != 0] <- 0.0315131  

#Assign residuals to raster cells
EI.XA.rastProc.vif[Env.stack.3.df$ID] <- EI.XA.resids.vif  

##Map the results----
pdf("EI.XA.ProcrustesMap.vif.pdf")
plot(EI.XA.rastProc.vif, col = sequential_hcl(23, "Lajolla"),
     main="EI vs. XA",
     font.main=4, font.lab=4, font.sub=4)
dev.off()

EI.XA.rastProc.vif.2 <- tm_shape(EI.XA.rastProc.vif)+
  tm_raster(style = 'cont',
            n=6, 
            palette= "-RdGy",
            title="",
            legend.is.portrait = FALSE) +
  tm_shape(gnp) +  
  tm_borders("black", lwd = 1)  +
  tm_shape(EI.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 24,
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_shape(XA.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 24,
             border.col="white",
             col = "black",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.stack = "horizontal",
            legend.outside.position = "bottom",
            legend.outside.size = 0.1, 
            legend.text.size = 1,
            legend.title.size=1.5,
            main.title = "EI vs. XA", title.size = 0.4, 
            title.position = c("right", "center"), 
            inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05))

tmap_save(EI.XA.rastProc.vif.2, filename = "EI.XA.ProcrustesMap.vif_2.pdf")

#EOvsGA----
EO.GA.diff.procrustes.vif = procrustes(EO.PCA.vif, GA.PCA.vif, scale=TRUE, symmetrical=FALSE)
EO.GA.resids.vif = residuals(EO.GA.diff.procrustes.vif)

summary(EO.GA.resids.vif)
#Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
#0.0002381 0.0057698 0.0087426 0.0105239 0.0145557 0.0587638

#Specify raster properties based on an existing one
EO.GA.rastProc.vif <- Env.stack.3$BIO05  

# Make all non-zero values in mask = 0.015
EO.GA.rastProc.vif[EO.GA.rastProc.vif != 0] <- 0.0587638

#Assign residuals to raster cells
EO.GA.rastProc.vif[Env.stack.3.df$ID] <- EO.GA.resids.vif  

##Map the results----
pdf("EO.GA.ProcrustesMap.vif.pdf")
plot(EO.GA.rastProc.vif, col = sequential_hcl(23, "Lajolla"),
     main="EO vs. GA",
     font.main=4, font.lab=4, font.sub=4)
dev.off()

EO.GA.rastProc.vif.2 <- tm_shape(EO.GA.rastProc.vif)+
  tm_raster(style = 'cont',
            n=6, 
            palette= "-RdGy",
            title="",
            legend.is.portrait = FALSE) +
  tm_shape(gnp) +  
  tm_borders("black", lwd = 1)  +
  tm_shape(EO.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 23,
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_shape(GA.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 21,
             border.col="white",
             col = "black",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.stack = "horizontal",
            legend.outside.position = "bottom",
            legend.outside.size = 0.1, 
            legend.text.size = 1,
            legend.title.size=1.5,
            main.title = "EO vs. GA", title.size = 0.4, 
            title.position = c("right", "center"), 
            inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05))

tmap_save(EO.GA.rastProc.vif.2, filename = "EO.GA.ProcrustesMap.vif_2.pdf")

#EOvsXA----
EO.XA.diff.procrustes.vif = procrustes(EO.PCA.vif, XA.PCA.vif, scale=TRUE, symmetrical=FALSE)
EO.XA.resids.vif = residuals(EO.XA.diff.procrustes.vif)

summary(EO.XA.resids.vif)
#     Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
#0.0001908 0.0060101 0.0077643 0.0079720 0.0094949 0.0181932 

#Specify raster properties based on an existing one
EO.XA.rastProc.vif <- Env.stack.3$BIO05  

# Make all non-zero values in mask = 0.015
EO.XA.rastProc.vif[EO.XA.rastProc.vif != 0] <- 0.0181932

#Assign residuals to raster cells
EO.XA.rastProc.vif[Env.stack.3.df$ID] <- EO.XA.resids.vif  

##Map the results----
pdf("EO.XA.ProcrustesMap.vif.pdf")
plot(EO.XA.rastProc.vif, col = sequential_hcl(23, "Lajolla"),
     main="EO vs. XA",
     font.main=4, font.lab=4, font.sub=4)
dev.off()

EO.XA.rastProc.vif.2 <- tm_shape(EO.XA.rastProc.vif)+
  tm_raster(style = 'cont',
            n=6, 
            palette= "-RdGy",
            title="",
            legend.is.portrait = FALSE) +
  tm_shape(gnp) +  
  tm_borders("black", lwd = 1)  +
  tm_shape(EO.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 23,
             border.col="black",
             col = "white",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_shape(XA.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 24,
             border.col="white",
             col = "black",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.stack = "horizontal",
            legend.outside.position = "bottom",
            legend.outside.size = 0.1, 
            legend.text.size = 1,
            legend.title.size=1.5,
            main.title = "GA vs. XA", title.size = 0.4, 
            title.position = c("right", "center"), 
            inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05))

tmap_save(EO.XA.rastProc.vif.2, filename = "EO.XA.ProcrustesMap.vif_2.pdf")

#GAvsXA----
GA.XA.diff.procrustes.vif = procrustes(GA.PCA.vif, XA.PCA.vif, scale=TRUE, symmetrical=FALSE)
GA.XA.resids.vif = residuals(GA.XA.diff.procrustes.vif)

summary(GA.XA.resids.vif)
#     Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
#8.052e-05 2.607e-03 3.960e-03 4.847e-03 5.624e-03 3.742e-02 

#Specify raster properties based on an existing one
GA.XA.rastProc.vif <- Env.stack.3$BIO05  

# Make all non-zero values in mask = 0.015
GA.XA.rastProc.vif[GA.XA.rastProc.vif != 0] <- 3.742e-02 

#Assign residuals to raster cells
GA.XA.rastProc.vif[Env.stack.3.df$ID] <- GA.XA.resids.vif  

##Map the results----
pdf("GA.XA.ProcrustesMap.vif.pdf")
plot(GA.XA.rastProc.vif, col = sequential_hcl(23, "Lajolla"),
     main="GA vs. XA",
     font.main=4, font.lab=4, font.sub=4)
dev.off()

GA.XA.rastProc.vif.2 <- tm_shape(GA.XA.rastProc.vif)+
  tm_raster(style = 'cont',
            n=6, 
            palette= "-RdGy",
            title="",
            legend.is.portrait = FALSE) +
  tm_shape(gnp) +  
  tm_borders("black", lwd = 1)  +
  tm_shape(GA.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 21,
             border.col="white",
             col = "black",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_shape(XA.coords.shp) +
  tm_symbols(shape = "Pop",
             shapes = 24,
             border.col="white",
             col = "black",
             border.lwd=0.7,
             size = 0.5,
             legend.shape.show = F)+
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.stack = "horizontal",
            legend.outside.position = "bottom",
            legend.outside.size = 0.1, 
            legend.text.size = 1,
            legend.title.size=1.5,
            main.title = "GA vs. XA", title.size = 0.4, 
            title.position = c("right", "center"), 
            inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05))

tmap_save(GA.XA.rastProc.vif.2, filename = "GA.XA.ProcrustesMap.vif_2.pdf")

#PLot procrustes residuals across species----

rastProc <- stack(CR.XA.rastProc.vif, BM.GA.rastProc.vif, EO.XA.rastProc.vif, CR.EO.rastProc.vif, BM.CR.rastProc.vif, 
                  BM.XA.rastProc.vif, EI.XA.rastProc.vif, EI.EO.rastProc.vif, CR.EI.rastProc.vif, GA.XA.rastProc.vif, 
                  CR.GA.rastProc.vif, BM.EO.rastProc.vif, BM.EI.rastProc.vif, EO.GA.rastProc.vif, EI.GA.rastProc.vif)

gnp <- st_read("/Users/simon/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-DeakinUniversity/Thesis/3_Experiment/1_Chapter/1_2_Data/GeoSpatial/Shapefiles/Grampians_W/Grampians_Wh_2.shp")

tmap_mode("plot")
rastProc.spp <- 
  tm_shape(rastProc)+
  tm_raster(style = 'cont',
            n=6, 
            palette= "-RdBu",
            title="",
            legend.is.portrait = FALSE) +
  tm_shape(gnp) + 
  #tm_borders("black", lwd = 1)  +
  tm_facets(ncol=5, free.scales = FALSE) +
  #tm_facets(ncol=5) +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
            legend.stack = "horizontal",
            legend.outside.position = "bottom",
            legend.outside.size = 0.1, 
            legend.text.size = 1,
            legend.title.size=1.5,
            #main.title = "Procrustes residuals: Difference in mapped spatial patten", title.size = 1, 
            title.position = c("right", "top"), 
            inner.margins = c(0.03, 0.05, 0.03, 0.05),
            panel.labels = c("CA. vs. XA","BA. vs. GR","EU. vs. XA","CA. vs. EU","BA. vs. CA", 
                             "BA. vs. XA","EP. vs. XA","EP. vs. EU","CA. vs. EP","GR. vs. XA", 
                             "CA. vs. GR","BA. vs. EU","BA. vs. EP","EU. vs. GR","EP. vs. GR")) 

tmap_save(rastProc.spp, filename = "Procrustes_map_spp_vif_2_scaled.pdf")
#tmap_save(rastProc.spp, filename = "Procrustes_map_spp_vif_2.pdf")
```
